events.title: рҹҢҲ Raleigh Premiere Screening of 'It's Not You. It's Me: Chicago!'
events.description:
рҹҺ¬ Are you single, ready to mingle, and working to heal? Kick off your 2026 Pride Weekend in the Triangle with an exclusive screening of the new award-winning relationship, dating, and mental health docuseries that's creating international buzz!

Hosted by Out! Raleigh Pride and the LGBT Center of Raleigh, join us for an evening of singly mingling, intimate viewing, insightful conversation, and colorful celebrations for the Raleigh premiere screening of "It's Not You. It's Me: Chicago!"

This award-winning queer dating and mental health docuseries is making international waves and now itвҖҷs coming to Raleigh for one night only! Bring your boo, your bestie, or both! You don't want to miss this!

Proceeds support the completion of the series and continued services at the Center вқӨпёҸ. Grab your ticket using the link in our bio!

events.title: рҹӨқ The Wiley Fosters Last Show
events.description:
Today, weвҖҷre sharing sad news. After almost seven years, Mystery Brewing Company will be closing its doors at the end of the day on October 31st.
.
.
This has been an incredibly difficult decision. WeвҖҷve always been undercapitalized, and itвҖҷs been a struggle to operate for some time now. WeвҖҷve suffered a string of pretty bad luck over the past couple of years: equipment failures, construction and permitting delays, storm-related outages and losses. The end result is that we can no longer afford to operate.
.
.
Over the course of the next week, weвҖҷll be doing the best we can to celebrate everything we love about Mystery to give it a fond farewell, releasing some favorite old beers that weвҖҷve had kicking around in the back of the cooler, and trying to say goodbye the best way we can. If you get a chance, please come and visit us, say hi, and enjoy a pint, a meal, or a night of music for the last time. The Wiley Fosters вҖ“ our amazing house band вҖ“ will be playing our last show at the pub on the evening of October 27th.
.
.
WeвҖҷre enormously proud of the community that has grown up around Mystery, and weвҖҷll miss being here every day for Hillsborough.
.
.
With one last raised glass,
.
.
Erik Lars Myers
Founder, Brewer, CEO
Mystery Brewing Company

events.title: рҹӨқ The Sunday Show (Free Stand-Up Comedy)
events.description: TodayвҖҷs #BeerChurch is dogfishheadвҖҷs Palo Santo Marron (2015). An unfiltered, unfettered, unprecedented brown ale aged in handmade wooden brewing vessels. The caramel and vanilla complexity unique to this beer comes from the exotic Paraguayan Palo Santo wood from which these tanks were crafted. Palo Santo means "holy tree," and its wood has been used in South American wine-making communities. This highly roasty and malty brown ale clocks in at 12% ABV. Pub is open from 11:30 AM - 10 PM, and The Sunday Show (free) stand up comedy starts at 8 PM! #hillsboroughNC

events.title: рҹӨқ Live music from writeplayrepeat
events.description: ItвҖҷs a soup & sandwich kind of day. Head to the Pub for our Short Rib & Pumpkin Cassoulet with white beans, tomatoes, herbs, and leeks. We also have five sandwiches on the October menu including the Edamame Pate with local sprouts, cucumbers, roasted peppers, arugula, and herb aioli on sourdough. We had to postpone the savinggracenc adoption event due to weather, but the Pub is still open all day! Live music from writeplayrepeat tonight at 8:30 PM! See you in #HillsboroughNC.

events.title: рҹӨқ Worship Night
events.description:
YOU'RE INVITED for a night of fellowship and lifting our voices in praise together! Join us for Worship Night this Sunday, March 1 at 6 p.m. at The Foundry (7326 Sunrise Road)! 

WeвҖҷll gather for a focused time of worship, inspiration, and intentional prayer for our nation and our local communities. This special night of worship is in partnership with the NC East District of the Wesleyan Church! WeвҖҷre honored to host at The Foundry, with worship led by the Love Chapel Hill Worship Team.

events.title: рҹӨқ An Unlikely Lent: Extraordinary People of the Easter Story
events.description:
Whether youвҖҷve observed Lent for years or you still have questions about what it even is, we invite you to join us and learn together!

WeвҖҷre intentionally journeying through Lent in our next discipleship course, An Unlikely Lent: Extraordinary People of the Easter Story, starting TONIGHT, Feb. 24 at 7 p.m. Together, weвҖҷll explore the surprising, ordinary, and unlikely people woven into the Easter story and what we can learn from each of them. 

рҹ“Ҷ Tuesdays at 7 p.m. at The Foundry

Bring your curiosity, your experiences, and your questions!

TONIGHT 6/1: Go Figure Community is back for this month's installation. Join us a laid-back, mediative session between you.... your stylus of choice... and the paper...

If you're looking for an accessible outlet to practice and find community, these sessions are for you. 

Hosted by artofnickdahlstrom, this Community version of Go Figure Durham isn't structured like their regular classes, but rather, it's a chance to try out something new in a safe, supportive environment.

Friendly reminder рҹ‘ү grab your art supplies and bring your mobile easel or your favorite drawing surface before heading over tonight. 

Tickets are available at the Theater door tonight.

Doors open at 6:30pm. 
Figure Drawing session starts at 7pm.

events.title: рҹҺө Vic-Syn Spins Performance
events.description:
Have you ever felt a room light up from the presence of a fairy? You'll feel that same spark of electricity when Vic-Syn Spins takes the stage. вңЁпёҸ

Balancing technique and flow, this aerialist loves combining physically challenging poses with thoughtful movement to inspire others in finding joy and liberation through movement arts.рҹҺҲ

Over the years, their stage performance and movement arts journey has expanded to include disciplines of pole, flow, fire, and aerial hoopвҖ” keeping the energy hypercharged all night long for an elevated and immersive audience experience. рҹ”Ҙ

Find Vic-Syn Spins spinning heads and dazzling through the night next Saturday.вңЁпёҸ

events.title: рҹҺө Collage Club
events.description:
THIS WEDNESDAY, MAY 20TH:

Join us for Collage Club in the Theater with joseph_rafferty 

Collage Club is a monthly community gathering at The Fruit. Rooted in Surrealism, we use provided materials - substrates (base), scissors, glue sticks, found objects, pre-cut imagesвҖ”to explore visual play, personification, and the subconscious. 

Each session begins with a theme and prompts designed to encourage "creating first and thinking later." All experience levels are welcome to join this creative laboratory where things that look like things become something else entirely!

Collage Club is a creative session lead by our friend and renowned creative mystic, Joseph Rafferty.

All needed materials are included with the session entry fee.

рҹ“… Wed, May 20th

events.title: рҹҺө MJ: The Essentials вҖ” a live dance tribute
events.description:
THIS WEEKEND: rdhproductions presents
MJ: The Essentials вҖ” a live dance tribute celebrating the legacy and artistry of Michael Jackson through a chronological showcase of music, dance, and visual storytelling.

Under the creative direction of Romell D. Harris, this is not just a tribute вҖ” itвҖҷs a reimagined performance experience. Expect signature choreography, powerful storytelling, and a fresh spin on the MJ catalog. From the anthems you love to the most electrifying performance moments, this showcase will honor the legacy while pushing artistic boundaries.

This live performance experience features:
вҖў Timeline-based show (Jackson 5 era вҶ’ Thriller era вҶ’ 90s stadium era вҶ’ Legacy finale)
вҖў Theatrical transitions
вҖў Visual projections
вҖў Live monologues 
вҖў Originally reimagined choreography

It's here for a two-day matinee run with doors opening at 3:30pm both this afternoon and Sunday the 17th.

Show begins at 4pm.
рҹ“ҚBlackbox Theater 

See you tonight!

рҹ”—рҹҢҗ

events.title: рҹҺө Photo Jam
events.description:
TONIGHT вҳҶ THUR 5/14

Come learn & play at the Photo Jam! Hosted by Fruit resident artist Jess Cruger and renowned local photographer Michael Gillman, this skillshare  workshop invites you to partake in a playful hands-on environment with a focus on creative ways to use off-camera flash. 

Open to both photographers of all skill levels and anyone who'd like to model for photos. 
Come meet others in the local photography community!

Doors open at 6:30pm.
Workshop begins at 7pm, kicking off with an informational section from Michael Gillman, followed by a session of open practice.

Runtime 7pm - 9pm.
$20 session entry at the door.

See you tonight!

events.title: рҹҺө Go Figure: Figure Drawing Session
events.description:
NEXT MONDAY 5/4:

Always wanted to try out Figure Drawing? or perhaps you're looking to get back into the practice after some time off? Or.... you don't care too much for drawing but just want to meet local creatives in our natural habit. If any of this resonates with you, you're in luck. 

Go Figure is a drawing group founded to bring community together and make figure drawing accessible. This isn't a class but a chance to try something new out in a safe, supportive environment.

You are welcome to bring whatever drawing supplies you are currently finding inspiration in & ideally a mobile easel if you have one, but please, nothing that makes a mess... 
*ahem* NO dripping, squirting, or splashes. рҹҺЁрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹҺЁ 

Doors open at 6:30. Drawing is from 7pm-9pm.
Mature audiences only. 18+ only.

*Absolutely NO photography of the model or the space while the event is active.*

events.description:

The lovely folks behind Kink Practice serve us a delicious Open House treat next Saturday.

Watch demonstrations by rope, fire, and other adult practitioners and learn how to get involved in the local community!

Meet and chat with locals who are excited to show off their skills (no audience participation permitted) and keep you entertained before the film festival begins. Check out the info booth to get linked up to classes and educational opportunities in the area.

hounds.tooth1

events.title: рҹҢҲ Dancing With The Carolina Stars: Celebration
events.description:
Dancing with the Stars вҖ“ DURHAM edition! рҹҢҹ

Michelle is officially competing in carolinatheatredurhamвҖҷs Dancing With The Carolina Stars: Celebration on May 20! SheвҖҷll be on stage with her dance partner Alyssa ascho3 supporting the theaterвҖҷs mission during their biggest fundraising night of the year. 

While Michelle loves a dance party, Alyssa brings choreography to the table as one half of A+A Dance Company aandadanceco and co-director and co-producer for RECITAL recital_durham. Vote for this powerhouse team via donation to the Carolina Theatre! Link via carolinatheatredurham рҹ’–

Every ticket sold and donation/vote given supports the Carolina Theatre, one of DurhamвҖҷs most beloved institutions that provides a platform that allows artists to entertain and express through the creation of emotional and educational experiences that reshape hearts and minds.

Come support the arts & all the folks dancing!

events.title: рҹҢҲ Fernet Celebration & Merchants of the Know Award
events.description:
Fernet celebration this Wednesday 4/1!!! 3-5pm!

Come on out as our friends at Fernet award us/you for being loyal Fernet imbibers. This means all you industry folk, Fernet fans, and those with a fun free 2 hours 3-5pm on a week day are INVITED!

We are being awarded with the Merchants of the Know award, honoring top sellers and those with long term commitment to pouring Fernet at their bars. 

There will be a trophy, cupcakes, Fernet swag, and SPECIALTY cocktail menu featuring Fernet and Borghetti. Menu on both Tues and Weds!

events.title: рҹҢҲ Fernet Trophy Celebration & Award Ceremony
events.description:
Fernet is giving us a trophy thanks to YOU all!!!! To all our fellow industry pros, QueenyвҖҷs regulars, late night crew, Fernet lovers, and those who have yet to taste this perfect delicious elixir of hospitality delight вҖ“ weвҖҷre celebrating years of consistent Fernet drinkage with Fernet (yes, really, Fernet-Brancaв„ўпёҸ) Wednesday, April 1 from 3-5pm. And shockingly, thatвҖҷs not an April FoolвҖҷs Joke. Come join us!

We are being awarded with the Merchants of the Know award, honoring top sellers and those with long term commitment to pouring Fernet at their bars. 

For this, weвҖҷll have a special menu with a Fernet cocktail, Borghetti cocktail, and the classic BartenderвҖҷs Handshake this Tuesday-Wednesday. 

At some point, weвҖҷll be gifted a Statue of Fernando (yes, the crocodile) and take a celebratory round of shots. JOIN US!

events.description:
Happy Mardi Gras!!!! рҹҺәрҹ’ңвҡңпёҸ Parade accessories happily brought you by scrapexchange & the clever crafty mind of our team, notably one Saca Monk, who is back to tell you to join us in our walkin' parade, starting at 4:45ish!

TODAY, Feb. 17!

рҹҹЎ DOWNTOWN WALKING PARADE / SHUFFLE:
~very informal! join & drop, come and go, etc. Not for kids, but kids are welcome with an adult!~

рҹҹўKrewe Name: Tessarae of the Royal Kaleidoscope

1пёҸвғЈ 4:45pm: gather atВ seraphinedurhamВ looking FAB. Our friends at Seraphine will have some drink specials, PLUS crawfish for purchase by the pound!!
2пёҸвғЈ 5:15pm ISH: strut along toВ eatqueenburgerВ for Hurricane cocktails, bobbing forВ lutrabakeryВ king cake and more festivities
3пёҸвғЈ 5:30pm ISH: we'll high tail it up the street to meet at the downtown Durham Bull where to rest of Durham Mardi Gras will be to celebrate before all the parties around town!
4пёҸвғЈ 6:30pm ISH: circle back to our friends atВ killerqueendurhsmВ for trivia & wine specials
рҹҺү After, we'll head toВ queenysdurhamВ /В kingfisherdurhamВ for a double decker celebration!

рҹҺӯ Fabulousness is encouraged! Find that old feather boa, your sparkliest shirt, the snazziest suit, and/or your favorite accessory. рҹҺү

рҹҹЎQUEENY's: party (no cover) from 8-12pm withВ 99brassbandВ starting at 8:30pm, rice & beans, cocktails, king cake & dancing!

рҹҹЈKINGFISHER: speakeasy New Orleans jazz vibes (electric organ trio!) withВ mark.wells.musicВ (no cover) & a specialty Mardi Gras cocktail menu. Celebratory vibes, but laid back groovy.

events.title: рҹҢҲ Downtown Walking Parade / Shuffle (Mardi Gras)
events.description:
Parade! Party! Deets from some familiar faces PLUS more below в¬ҮпёҸ 

Fat Tuesday, Feb. 17!

рҹҹЎ DOWNTOWN WALKING PARADE / SHUFFLE:
~very informal! Join & drop, come and go, etc. Kids can attend but not a kid event (earlier is best for kiddos prob)~

рҹҹўKrewe Name: Tessarae of the Royal Kaleidoscope
рҹҹўMORE on parade theme at bottom!

1пёҸвғЈ 4:45pm: gather at seraphinedurham in fabulous attire and costume, they'll have some drink special! We'll have crafted kaleidoscopes & beads to share
2пёҸвғЈ 5:15pm ISH: strut along to eatqueenburger for Hurricane cocktails, bobbing for lutrabakery king cake and more festivities
3пёҸвғЈ 5:30pm ISH: we'll high tail it up the street to meet at the downtown Durham Bull where to rest of Durham Mardi Gras will be to celebrate before all the parties around town!
4пёҸвғЈ 6:30pm ISH: circle back to our friends at killerqueendurhsm for trivia & wine specials 
рҹҺү After, we'll head to queenysdurham / kingfisherdurham for a double decker celebration! 

рҹҺӯ Fabulousness is encouraged! Find that old feather boa, your sparkliest shirt, the snazziest suit, and/or your favorite accessory. рҹҺү

рҹҹЎQUEENY's: party (no cover) from 8-12pm with 99brassband starting at 8:30pm, rice & beans, cocktails, king cake & dancing!

рҹҹЈKINGFISHER: speakeasy New Orleans jazz vibes (electric organ trio!) with mark.wells.music (no cover) & a specialty Mardi Gras cocktail menu. Celebratory vibes, but laid back groovy.

рҹҹўPARADE THEME:
вҖўKrewe Name: Tessarae of the Royal Kaleidoscope
вҖўAbbreviated TRKвҖ“ krewe members are вҖңTRricKstersвҖқ
вҖўInspo for the name: A Kaleidoscope is both the multicolored tube shaped toy and the name of a group of Monarch butterflies. And our restaurants included monarch-themed names and "colorful" variety. Tessarae is the name of the little pieces of colored glass making up the shapes in the kaleidoscope.
вҖўTheme for Parade: вҖңDurham, City Of Medi-SINвҖқ
вҖўThe vision: rowdy, roaming merriment through the streets of downtown Durham that ends at the official Mardi Gras Party at QueenyвҖҷs. Spreading the spirit of Mardi Gras with hand made throws and beads, costumes, and music. Inviting all bystanders to join in or meet us later.

events.description:

Here's what's happening...

Pre-parties:
рҹ”№ Sign-making for teens at The Corner Teen Center (chapelhillparks)
рҹ”№ Live music & more for adults at rougarou_imbibe

вңЁ Hear speakers & walk to 140 West Plaza together

рҹҢҲ Community mural with serendibcreative

events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
Happy #PrideMonth, yвҖҷall! рҹҢҲ

#SmallTownPride is in full swing across Chapel Hill and Carrboro this June. Join us for these celebrations:

рҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲ Saturday, June 6 (12вҖ“3 pm): Chapel Hill Pride Promenade

рҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲ Friday, June 26 (4:30 pm): CarrboroвҖҷs Pride Piper Walk

рҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲ Friday, June 26 (5вҖ“9 pm): Carrboro Pride Dance Party / Fiesta del Orgullo de Carrboro

And donвҖҷt miss these Pride art installations:

вңЁ New temporary piece by morrowdowdle and maxdowdle, called "Shelter for the Coming Out," installing in downtown Chapel Hill this week

вңЁ irisgottlieb's 2024 art bus, "Queer Leaders of Chapel Hill," is still rolling around Town вҖ” catch it up close at the Pride Promenade!

рҹ”— #LinkInBio (Small Town Pride)

events.title: рҹҢҲ Exhibition by Sampada Kodagali Agarwal
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
Intricate pattern and storytelling collide in our newest exhibition by Sampada Kodagali Agarwal (ansimit.sampada).

вҖңThis exhibition brings together the timeless wisdom of AesopвҖҷs Fables and beloved childrenвҖҷs animal stories, reimagined through the intricate visual language of Gond-inspired art,вҖқ Sampada says. вҖңRooted in the indigenous traditions of central India, Gond art is known for its rhythmic lines, detailed patterns, and deep connection to nature and storytelling.вҖқ

Come visit (itвҖҷs free!):
рҹ”ё On display until July 9
рҹ”ё Located at chapelhillpubliclibrary
рҹ”ё Mon-Thurs: 10am-8pm, Fri-Sun: 10am-6pm
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: рҹҢҲ Chapel Hill-Carrboro Juneteenth Celebration
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
One month until the annual Chapel Hill-Carrboro Juneteenth Celebration!

On Friday, June 19 from 4вҖ“8pm, come to Hargraves Community Center to enjoy live music and line dancing, shop local vendors and food trucks, and celebrate Juneteenth with your neighbors.

Juneteenth, also known as Emancipation Day, commemorates the emancipation of enslaved people in the United States. The Towns of Chapel Hill and Carrboro proclaimed the observance and commemoration of Juneteenth on June 19, 2020 and encourage residents and employers to recognize the holiday.

рҹ”— #LinkInBio (Festivals & Events)

Hosted by chapelhillarts and townofcarrboro

рҹ“ё Mark Losey
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.description:

events.title: рҹҢҲ The Living Lineage
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.location: Chapel Hill Town Hall (405 MLK Jr. Blvd, Chapel Hill, NC)
events.description:
Step inside вҖңThe Living Lineage,вҖқ our newest Public Spaces exhibition at Chapel Hill Town Hall.
 
This group show from artist.ummah brings together seven artists devoted to the disciplined study of the classical Muslim arts.
 
вҖңTogether, these Muslim-American artists draw from a rich artistic inheritance to cultivate education and understanding, inviting broader audiences into a living tradition that builds bridges between art, identity, and community.вҖқ
 
Come visit (itвҖҷs free!):
рҹ”№ On display until June 11
рҹ”№ 405 MLK Jr. Blvd, Chapel Hill, NC
рҹ”№ Hours: Mon-Fri, 8:30am-5pm
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: рҹҢҲ Exhibition by Voon Wong
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
Have you seen our latest exhibition by Voon Wong (artvw)? 

Exploring everyday interactions and drawing from his own personal experiences, VoonвҖҷs watercolors are rooted in memory, culture, and humanity. 
 
Voon discovered his passion for art in high school and studied at an art college in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, before earning a masterвҖҷs degree from academy_of_art. His early watercolor paintings feature serene landscapes and local fishing boats, reflecting his connection to coastal life. Today, he focuses on capturing human experiences. In 2025, he was honored with Signature Member status in both the nwsgallery and the watercolorsocietync.
 
Come visit (itвҖҷs free!):
рҹ”ё On display until May 7
рҹ”ё Located at chapelhillpubliclibrary
рҹ”ё Mon-Thurs: 10am-8pm, Fri-Sun: 10am-6pm
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: рҹҢҲ Faces of the Forest Kickoff Event
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
It's officially spring! What better time to get outside and explore public art?

"Faces of the Forest" is a brand-new outdoor art installation at Pritchard Park by Levi Yakubu (yakubupottery), a fifth-generation Nigerian potter.

We're celebrating this addition to Chapel Hill's permanent art collection tomorrow, March 21 with a kickoff event from 1-3pm at chapelhillpubliclibrary:

рҹҢі Artist talk at 1pm & live clay demos by Levi Yakubu
рҹҢІ StaffвҖ‘led & selfвҖ‘guided walks to see the artwork
рҹҢі Poetry performance by Chapel Hill Poet Laureate Donovan Livingston (dlive87)
рҹҢІ Interactive clay station with the Community Clay Studio team

events.title: рҹҺө Bear Ghost
events.description:
ANNOUNCING! BEAR GHOST - Sat Oct 3 @ MOTORCO

with SARAH & THE SAFE WORD / SPACEMAN BOB

GET TIX - 12PM FRIDAY, JUNE 5 @ motorcomusic.com/event/bear-ghost

andmoreagainpresents 

"BIOS ARE FOR THE WEAK!" Bear Ghost cried as they meekly tapped out a Spotify bio, pausing every minute or so to recover from a productive sob. Productive in the sense of how many fluid ounces of mucin, glucose, sodium, etc. they produced, but little else. Their fingers pruned to the bone from the tears veiling the keyboard they feverishly clicked away at.

The room was dim. An overhead light flickered and danced to an eclectic rhythm of a song that had not yet been written. But would be written. By Bear Ghost, probably.

"Why must you torture yourselves?" mewled their manager, fearing for their sanity as they neared day 11 without sleep. His fingers pruned to the bone from his fondest hobby: sundrying plums with his bare hands.

Bear Ghost rose to their feet, eyes swollen. They looked calm now. Resigned but resolute. "How else will they know?" they pleaded, faltering as their knees begged to give way. "How else will they know that Bear Ghost is an Adventure Rock band that fuses fun and quirky musicianship with complex melodies, phat harmonies, heavy riffitude, and pop structure to deliver a sound purposely crafted to fill all booties, tall and small, with righteous boogie?"

The room was still, but undeniably changed. The air somehow tingling. Light and effervescent with the anticipation of something new, something fresh, something that could maybe, just maybe, save the whole wide world.

"You did it," choked their stunned manager. "I'll get the president on the phone."

events.title: рҹҺө ROBERT LESTER FOLSOM
events.description:
NOW ON SALE! ROBERT LESTER FOLSOM - Wed Oct 7 @ MOTORCO

GET TIX @ motorcomusic.com/event/robert-lester-folsom

catscradlenc Presents

Unlike similar iconoclasts with crystal vision who held forth with the oppressive thumb of a musical dictator, Folsom was ever in service of song, standing equally aside his collaborators, which uniformly engendered affinity and respect lasting to this day. While a tick higher than the second-tier, the mountaintop was always narrowly out his grasp. Though, with the right set of opportunities, bolstered by talent and drive, Folsom, if not as a stand-alone, star-quality artist, could have led the career of any number of songwriters behind the curtain who rode the magical musical continuum across the decades with faceless success. Perhaps it was Robert and companyвҖҷs playing вҖңweird spacey stuff and ballads,вҖқ as guitarist VanBrackle describes, in small town Georgia skating rinks, bowling alleys, and school dances expecting Top 40 dance-ready hits which held them down. Perhaps it was simply location. Though, the music of Sunshine Only Sometimes is composed of an intrinsic ability to hear the music truly playing, as opposed to the space in air heard by the lay-ear, which places FolsomвҖҷs music in a timeless space primed for perennial (re)discovery.

events.title: рҹҺө Tokyo Tea Room
events.description:
NOW ON SALE! TOKYO TEA ROOM - Sat Oct 10 @ MOTORCO

GET TIX @ motorcomusic.com/event/tokyo-tea-room

Tokyo Tea Room are a band from Margate, UK, who strive to create music inspired by human emotions, exploring themes of longing and the ephemeral nature of existence. With a warm, hypnotic sound shaped by introspective songwriting and production from Daniel James Elliott, the project carries a distinct and immersive sonic identity. Tokyo Tea Room is a timeless project whose message transcends the music itself, arousing passions and emotions and taking listeners on a journey within a tender, comforting bubble.

Their debut album No Rush established them as one of the most compelling emerging acts in alternative music, resonating with a growing global audience. With millions of monthly listeners and a sold-out debut North American tour, the band are quickly building momentum - particularly in the US, where their audience continues to expand.

With new music on the horizon, Tokyo Tea Room are entering a defining new chapter, evolving their sound while staying rooted in the emotional depth that defines their work.

andmoreagainpresents

events.title: рҹҺө CHANEL BEADS
events.description:
NOW ON SALE! CHANEL BEADS - Sun Oct 11 @ MOTORCO

GET TIX @ motorcomusic.com/event/chanel-beads

with MECHATOK / CAR CULTURE

Chanel Beads вҖ” the project of New York-based musician Shane Lavers вҖ” announces his debut album, Your Day Will Come (out 4/19 on Jagjaguwar), and shares the lead single/video, вҖңIdea June.вҖқ Your Day Will Come marks LaversвҖҷ arrival as a new force in experimental music. Throughout the album, Lavers captures the many contradictions of modern existence and the strange infiniteness of the digital world. Though he incorporates the scrappy sonics of post-punk, the gripping sentimentality of pop tunes, and the spectral artifice of electronic music, he blurs lines through unconventional song structures that build into transcendental climaxes. As he intentionally prints his songs down to embed fried artifacts and ghostly remains, the resulting songs have a time-collapsing quality, both transitory and timeless.

andmoreagainpresents

events.title: рҹҺө feeble little horse
events.description:
NOW ON SALE! feeble little horse - Sun Jul 12 @ MOTORCO

GET TIX @ motorcomusic.com/event/feeble-little-horse

feeble little horse is naturally delighted to present their third full-length LP, bitknot. The album was written, arranged, produced, and recorded by Sebastian Kinsler, Lydia Slocum, and Jake Kelley across their respective homes in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.

A spirited investigation into the unnatural space created between human nature and a culture of convenience, a synthesis of dirt and digital, bitknot by feeble little horse creates a language wherein one can re-imbue a sanctity of interdependence away from consumptive вҖңself-sufficiencyвҖқ and materialism. вҖңThe album art is based on the coincidental core memory matrix, which was used in old computers to store memory / access information using 0s and 1s. Each core, or вҖҳbit,вҖҷ is accessed through the grid of wires, like a knot that stores secret details and memories.вҖқ bitknot asks that we find new modes of being through this grid, entrusting one another with the collaborative construction of these knots. This negotiation with an ever-developing hybrid reality is expertly exemplified in the albumвҖҷs production вҖ” the buoyancy of KinslerвҖҷs arrangements provide a perfectly balanced surface tension for the weight of SlocumвҖҷs meandering introspection as they playfully harmonize against saccharine hooks, walls of noise, a supercharged car batteryвҖҷs worth of synths and samples dropped in the ocean of their guitar-driven songwriting framework, and some of KelleyвҖҷs most laser-focused drums to date to create a sonic chimera that is as likely to be found nascently developing in the early aughts as some unknown, chromatic future.

Rhymes written with sidewalk chalk that refuse to be erased in the AnthropoceneвҖҷs acid rain of destructive relationships, Herbert MarcuseвҖҷs One-Dimensional Man manifest through the spirit of a young woman born in the shadow of the Steel CityвҖҷs industrial ghosts, a study of the clumsy alchemy of IRL and WWW вҖ” it is within these rhizomatic contradictions that bitknot proliferates.

andmoreagainpresents
